original_snippet_context: Discussion of a project by Pereira Nunes about federal intervention to combat bubonic plague, compared to other interventions like aid to agriculture.
relevant_quote: EsJa emenda é uma espécie do cam- bio a 12 no convênio de Taubaté : vem prejudicar desoladoramentc o projecto.
justification: The text uses the analogy of "cambio a 12" (a 12 pence exchange rate) in the context of the Convênio de Taubaté to criticize an amendment hindering federal intervention against the plague. This implicitly aligns the author with an expansionist stance, which favored a lower exchange rate (like 12 pence) as part of the Convênio, contrasting it with the presumably less favorable "cambio" implied by the amendment.
